action.reasoning: Observation: GWNet mae_60min=3.5596, 100 epochs, 16s/epoch, 122K params. Still improving. Analysis: Model is too small and architecture has issues with per-timestep GCN loop. Need proper WaveNet-style architecture. Decision: Rewrite GWNet properly with larger capacity, train 150 epochs (~40min).
